codeReview.summary: Commit f48a70c hardens SQLite default project listing to skip corrupt summary rows and adds performance smoke coverage for default list/load/write flows. Review of the committed sqlite_store, sqlite_repository, and test additions found the implementation aligned with milestone scope and no high-confidence correctness or regression issue.

summary: Pass. Default SQLite project list/load/write behavior is covered by direct regression and performance smoke tests, and corrupt summary rows no longer break the full list.
